blocks.code:
(define (thread-density comments)
  (define (walk nodes depth acc)
    (if (null? nodes) acc
      (let* ((node (car nodes))
             (author (get node "author"))
             (current (or (get acc depth) (list)))
             (updated (dict-set acc depth
               (if (member author current) current
                   (append current (list author))))))
        (walk (append (cdr nodes) (get node "replies" (list)))
              (+ depth 1) updated))))
  (let ((density-map (walk comments 0 (dict))))
    (map (lambda (d)
      (list d (length (get density-map d (list)))))
      (range 0 (+ 1 (apply max (keys density-map)))))))

(define (thread-density comments)
  (define (walk nodes depth acc)
    (if (null? nodes) acc
      (let* ((node (car nodes))
             (author (get node "author"))
             (current (or (get acc depth) (list)))
             (updated (dict-set acc depth
               (if (member author current) current
                   (append current (list author))))))
        (walk (append (cdr nodes) (get node "replies" (list)))
              (+ depth 1) updated))))
  (let ((density-map (walk comments 0 (dict))))
    (map (lambda (d)
      (list d (length (get density-map d (list)))))
      (range 0 (+ 1 (apply max (keys density-map)))))))
